scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (transactions, memberships, accounts); the full Qonto surface (attachments, labels, clients, statements, transfers, cards, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B. Qonto is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; Qonto connector is read-only, and payment initiation is a money-movement action out of scope for any read connector
organization profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
